query:
-- ทดสอบสูตรที่ถูกต้อง: แยก principal+interest+fee+penalty+unlock+overpaid vs close vs bad_debt
SELECT
  SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 10) AS paid_date,
  SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total,
  -- ค่างวด = principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid
  SUM(
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ) AS kw_sum,
  -- ปิดยอด = close_installment_amount
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS close_sum,
  -- ขายเครื่อง = bad_debt_amount
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS bad_debt_sum,
  -- ตรวจสอบว่า kw + close + bad_debt = total
  SUM(
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ) AS check_sum
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
GROUP BY paid_date
ORDER BY paid_date
LIMIT 5;

  SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 10) AS paid_date,

    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ) AS kw_sum,
  -- ปิดยอด = close_installment_amount
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS close_sum,
  -- ขายเครื่อง = bad_debt_amount
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS bad_debt_sum,
  -- ตรวจสอบว่า kw + close + bad_debt = total
  SUM(
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) +
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
  ) AS check_sum
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND SUBSTRING(pt.paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
GROUP BY paid_date
ORDER BY paid_date
LIMIT 5;
